Name: Created
Description: Date and time when the subscription restriction was created

Name: Creator
Description: ID of user that created the subscription restriction

Name: CreatorFullName
Description: Full name of user that created the subscription restriction

Name: Employee
Description: ID of employee that linked to the subscription restriction

Name: EmployeeFullName
Description: Name of employee that linked to the subscription restriction

Name: EmployeeHID
Description: Readable ID of employee that linked to the subscription restriction

Name: Modified
Description: Last modified date of subscription restriction

Name: Modifier
Description: ID of last user that modified the subscription restriction

Name: ModifierFullName
Description: Full name of last user that modified the subscription restriction

Name: Subscription
Description: Subscription ID that the restriction is referenced to

Name: SubscriptionDescription
Description: Subscription description that the restriction is referenced to

Name: SubscriptionNumber
Description: Subscription number that the restriction is referenced to
